title: The Beginning of the End
summary: Chapter 30 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Beginning of the End. Theme: The end starts before anyone recognizes it.
sceneDescription: The beginning of the end is dusk before anyone names it, quiet and heavy at the edge of goodbye.
